name: Red Beans and Rice (Dupree)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dried red beans, soaked overnight
1 bunch green onions with tops, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and place them in 2 quarts of water with the salt pork.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 45 minutes.
4. Add chopped onions, green onions, bell pepper, and garlic; stir occasionally.
5. Cook slowly for 2 to 3 hours until beans are tender but not mushy.
6. Stir in parsley, salt, peppers, oregano, bay leaves, hot sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Combine with cooked rice in a large pot.
8. This dish can be made ahead of time and reheated over low heat or in the microwave.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
